title: nf-core/genephylomodeler pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

gene_name.errorMessage: Gene name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

alignment.errorMessage: Alignment file must have a valid extension (.fna, .faa, .fasta, .fa, .fas, .nex, .nxs, .phy, .aln)

tree.errorMessage: Tree file must have a valid extension (.tree, .tre, .nwk, .newick, .nex, .nxs)

suite.errorMessage: Suite must be one of: hyphy

tool.errorMessage: Tool must be one of: absrel, bgm, busted, fade, fel, gard, meme, relax, slac
